title: Settings
description: Manage system preferences and personalization options

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: Information for the currently logged-in user. Synchronized from Azure AD.
profile.azureAdNote: Profile information is synchronized from Azure Active Directory. For changes, please contact your IT administrator.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: System permissions granted to your current role

nav.adminHelp: Admin settings are shown based on your permissions

display.title: Display Settings
display.description: Customize the default display options for list pages.
display.languageDescription: Select the system display language. Changes take effect immediately.
display.itemsPerPageDescription: Set the default number of items to display on list pages.
display.dateFormatDescription: Select the default date format used throughout the system.
display.equipmentSortDescription: The sort order applied when first entering the equipment list page.
display.showRetiredDescription: Show retired and inactive equipment in the equipment list by default. When enabled, you can view complete equipment history.
display.saveNote: Settings take effect immediately and apply to all list pages

notifications.channelDescription: Configure how and when you receive notifications.
notifications.typeDescription: Select which notification categories to receive.
notifications.emailDescription: Receive calibration overdue, calibration due, and checkout overdue notifications via email. (Uses Azure AD account email)
notifications.frequencyDescription: Currently all notifications are sent immediately. Daily/weekly digest features will be added in the future.
notifications.digestTimeDescription: You can set the send time when daily/weekly digest feature is enabled.

system.title: System Settings
system.description: Change management settings that apply across the entire system.
system.warning: System settings affect the entire system. Please review carefully before making changes.
system.auditLogRetentionDescription: How long to keep audit logs. {code} means unlimited retention.
system.notificationRetentionDescription: Expired notifications are automatically cleaned up. Set an appropriate period for optimal system performance.
system.maintenanceMessagePlaceholder: Enter announcements such as scheduled maintenance...
system.maintenanceMessageDescription: The message will be displayed as a banner at the top of the dashboard. Leave empty to hide the banner.

calibration.title: Calibration Alert Settings
calibration.description: Configure when to send alerts for upcoming calibration and intermediate check deadlines. Alerts are sent on the selected D-day dates.

howItWorksItems.timing: Alerts are sent for equipment with upcoming calibration/intermediate checks on selected D-days
howItWorksItems.dedupe: Duplicate alerts are automatically prevented (same alert blocked within 24 hours)
howItWorksItems.overdue: Equipment is automatically marked as non-conforming when calibration is overdue (no grace period)

toasts.calibrationSaveError: Failed to save calibration alert settings.
